_meta.source: Nijigasaki High School Idol Club characters, derived from raw data with fan vote data considered as evidence
_meta.note_on_fan_votes: Fan MBTI votes provided as input signal but not treated as authoritative. Used as weighted evidence alongside textual analysis. Majority vote followed when supported by independent analysis; flagged when close.
_meta.note_on_traits_format: Each trait includes both score (-10 to +10) and reason (textual justification from analysis).

setsuna_yuki.name: Setsuna Yuki

E.reason: Strongly extroverted. 'Literal idol with the most aura out of every single group in love live,' inspires entire audiences to scream her name, pulls Yu in instantly with a single performance, approaches people with full charismatic presence. Student council president in her Nana persona, initiates conversations readily, teaches/coaches other members on dancing and singing. Not Ai-level (+9) because her extroversion is mission-channeled rather than pure radiation — she can intimidate Karin and Emma with her presidential seriousness, which is Fe-authority rather than pure warmth-broadcast.

J.reason: Structured and disciplined. Student council president who does homework ASAP and studies on off days, refined choreographer with trial-and-error perfectionism, pillow-throws in her sleep to correct Kasumi fooling around, disciplined daily practice. But gets absorbed to the point of losing track of time ('so engrossed in practice that I completely forgot' it was going to snow), carried away in fangirl mode. Mission-J rather than rigid-J.

T.reason: Strong F. Entirely feeling-driven — easily moved emotionally, mission is explicitly about feelings of affection, ate Kasumi's spicy bread to not let her down, can't bear disappointing people. Official comments are pure Fe warmth ('your voices are so warm and joyful,' 'my heart and body are filled with everyone's love'). No Ti/Te analytical content in her cognition; even her choreography refinement is aesthetic-emotional rather than systems-analytical.

C.reason: Net confident. 'Way too much self-confidence' per fan read, dives from third floors, confident declaring ambitious missions without embarrassment, handles student council president role with authority. But overconfidence has blind spots (famously terrible at cooking yet unaware), and the original-club-collapse trauma created a real self-forgiveness wound that led her to quit being a school idol entirely for a period. External confidence is high, underlying perfectionist-guilt is real.

M.reason: High ambition. Wants #1 school idol position ('I can't just sit around doing nothing!' 'to make sure I don't lose to anyone'), constantly refining choreography and singing despite already being top-tier, fights to stay at the top of monthly rankings, mission to 'fill the world with love' is global-scale. Same league as Megumi and Kozue but slightly lower because her ambition is mission-altruistic (love must reach everyone) rather than purely self-competitive — she cheers rivals on even while fighting them.

O.reason: Strong resilience. The original club collapsed under her zealotry and she blamed herself deeply — but she came back, rejoined, and rebuilt. Maintains burning passion against parental suppression of her hobbies for years, pushes through rainy days and heatstroke weather with cheerful reframing ('rain doesn't mean it's all bad'). The disbanding did break her for a period though, and her perfectionist self-punishment is a real downward pull. Resilience is tested and earned, not effortless.

A.reason: Genuinely caring on mission level. Supports friends' dreams, encourages everyone to pursue what they love, shares her stage willingly, forces herself to eat Kasumi's spicy bread rather than disappoint her, helps protagonist recruit members. But has the famous blind spot — pushed the original club past breaking by enforcing her vision of 'passionate school idols,' prioritized abstract audience feelings over close individual teammates under stress. PDB opinion D catches this: 'first thing she thought of was people, not even on herself or her close friends.' Warm but tunnel-visioned.

U.reason: Notably distinctive combination. Double life with Clark Kent glasses disguise, otaku/geek interests hidden under honor-student-president facade, strict household backstory, stage name taken from a light novel, 'Setsuna Scarlet Storm' running gag, dives from third floors, pillow-snipes in her sleep. But the core personality — passionate mission-driven charismatic idol who loves what she loves intensely — is a fairly archetypal role executed excellently. External garnish is memorable; internal core is conventional-passionate-protagonist.

N.reason: Moderately-strong N. Ni visible in her abstract visionary mission ('fill the world with love,' change the cultural condition of emotional expression), symbolic/metaphorical framing throughout official comments ('hearts connect and become one,' 'the moment when the world begins to be colored and shine'), sees idealized future states and works backward to them. Tempered by concrete-caution moments (10-member buffer rather than 5 because she learned from specific past experience) and tertiary Se physicality (dives, physical performance intensity). Solidly N but not maximal.

setsuna_yuki.mbti_reasoning: ENFJ with narrowest fan vote margin of any character analyzed (90 vs 81 ESFJ, ~53/47) — genuinely contested type where both camps have strong textual arguments. Going ENFJ based on scale and orientation of her mission. Her stated life purpose is transforming the cultural condition of emotional expression ('fill the world with love,' make it easier for everyone to honestly say what they love) — Si doesn't natively generate that scope of abstract-visionary mission. Si wants to preserve and refine what exists; Setsuna wants to change how people fundamentally relate to their feelings. That's Ni-Fe missionary cognition. She functions as a catalyst — Yu and Ayumu became school idols because her performance hit them like 'fate,' not because she taught them a method. Fe-Ni evangelism creates converts; Si-Fe creates students. Her fall pattern is textbook ENFJ zealotry: pushed her vision of 'passionate school idols' onto the original club so hard it fractured — the visionary who loses sight of individuals in service of the vision. PDB opinion D nails this: 'she just noticed the feelings of fans… didn't try to understand their struggles.' That's Fe-Ni tunnel-vision where abstract audience eclipses close-in individuals. ESFJ case is legitimate and well-argued (PDB opinions A/B/C): the 'trial and error' choreography refinement reads Si-Ne, the 10-member-not-5 plan was explicitly Si-cautious (learned from specific past experience), 'tagging isn't the same as running' stress-rigidity is Si-Te literal-mindedness, perfectionist self-punishment is Fe-Si guilt. But I read these as tertiary Ti and inferior Se expression within an ENFJ stack rather than dominant-Si operation — practical-caution backup serving her Ni vision, not the primary engine. The Umi comparison (opinion C) is useful: Setsuna shares Umi's rigidity and perfectionism but Umi wants μ's to succeed while Setsuna wants the world to overflow with love. Mission scale is the tell. Fits cleanly in the ENFJ family across both casts: she's the missionary/evangelist ENFJ (change how people relate to their passions), distinct from Megumi (visionary conqueror — enchant the world), Yu (pastor-supporter — enable bonded people), and Izumi (broken knight — borrow others' dreams to function). All four are Fe-Ni stacks expressed through radically different life-contexts.

shioriko_mifune.name: Shioriko Mifune

E.reason: Reserved and formal default. 'By and large just an ordinary person. Deadpan 24/7, working hard in the background,' 'a lot more on the shy side socially' even by PDB opinion C's own admission (a voter arguing FOR ESTJ). Passive in group settings — 'just exists,' doesn't react when Lanzhu/Kaoruko push her around. Steps forward assertively for duty (council speeches, debate challenge against Setsuna, offering strength/weakness advice) but that's role-action within an established framework, not natural extroverted energy. An actual ESTJ like Lanzhu commands rooms by existing; Shioriko commands situations by holding a role within them.

J.reason: Very high. Student council president material, methodical execution of duties, organized concrete-planning approach ('concrete organization of things when it comes to the council' per fan read), disciplined instructor-level mastery in traditional dance + tea ceremony + flower arranging (each requires years of J-rigor). Principled planner whose core doctrine — 'students should do things they can succeed at' — IS itself a planning philosophy. Works hard, does homework, reliable.

T.reason: Solidly T. Efficiency/utility-oriented cognition — evaluates activities by 'educational merit,' identifies people's strengths and weaknesses analytically (her signature talent is an analytical skill, not empathetic attunement), self-stated life plan 'to live my life doing the things I am most effective at.' Self-aware of her T: 'I think I'm not very good at conveying my feelings.' Struggles writing first song (tertiary Fi difficulty). Not max because genuine kindness softens delivery and she does integrate Fi growth over time.

C.reason: Mixed. External confidence when wielding her role — challenges Setsuna in debate, won the presidency on merit, gives unsolicited advice with conviction, speaks with authority in council. But baseline self-esteem is low: thought she'd fail as a school idol specifically like her sister did, fear-of-failure shaped her entire worldview, socially shy in non-role settings. 'Wanted to give up due to the thought of not being able to be good enough.' Slight negative — confidence is role-conferred rather than internal.

M.reason: Moderate-high. 'I will do my absolute best and definitely show you results,' took student council presidency from Setsuna through active campaign, achieved instructor-level certification in multiple traditional arts while also being top academic. But ambition is bounded by succeed-ability filter — deliberately avoided the school-idol path for years because she feared failing like her sister. Achievement-driven but explicitly risk-averse, which caps M relative to Lanzhu-tier ambition characters who pursue regardless of odds.

O.reason: Slight pessimist. 'Students should do things they can succeed at' is literally a failure-expectation doctrine — she advises people away from things they MIGHT fail at. Fear-of-failure shaped her core worldview via her sister's outcome, which she 'deluded herself into being worse than it was' per fan read. Does update well when shown new evidence (joins the club, grows, lets steam off in OVA) so resilience is real. Net slight negative from the pessimistic baseline despite recovery capacity.

A.reason: Genuinely caring under structural coldness. Wants to help everyone succeed in their club activities, kept Setsuna's secret when she stumbled onto it, polite and respectful by default, 'genuinely nice' in anime canon. But care is delivered through harsh pragmatism that ignores feelings in the moment — 'overly pragmatic, strict, cold and even antagonistic' in SIFAS, gives advice that upsets people initially before being proven correct. Warm underneath, stiff in delivery. Fi development over time softens this but baseline is structural-helpfulness more than emotional-attunement.

U.reason: Low. Explicitly 'by and large just an ordinary person. Stereotypically average,' deadpan, surrounded by eccentrics and notable for being the normal one. Her interests in traditional Japanese arts (dance, tea, flower arranging) are elegant-conventional, the opposite of eccentric. Her only 'uniqueness' is being normal-while-surrounded-by-weirdos, which is relative not absolute. Solid negative on this dimension.

N.reason: Strongly S. Concrete, present-focused, Si-grounded cognition. Value anchors in tradition (Japanese classical arts), proven methods, efficiency evaluated against observed track records, learns directly from sister's specific past experience to shape her own decisions. No abstract-visionary content anywhere in her character — even her opposition to school idols was evidence-based ('my sister's group failed') rather than principled-abstract. Pragmatic utilitarian evaluation throughout.

shioriko_mifune.mbti_reasoning: ISTJ — DISSENTING FROM MAJORITY FAN VOTE. Fans voted ESTJ 60 vs ISTJ 42 (~58/42, moderate margin not overwhelming). Going ISTJ on E/I; Te-vs-Si-dominance distinction is the crux. ESTJ voters argue from her assertiveness — challenging Setsuna, running for presidency, giving unsolicited strong advice. Real evidence, but these are role-executions: when she believes the system needs correction (school idol club wastes student potential), her sense of proper-order compels her to act, and she does. That's Si-Te auxiliary driving role-action, not dominant Te broadcasting. Her baseline default — deadpan, shy, 'just exists' in group chaos, passive around Lanzhu — is quiet-introvert. An actual ESTJ matches or overrides Lanzhu's energy; Shioriko absorbs it. On the canon split (SIFAS cold-antagonist vs anime gentle-supporter): both fit ISTJ with different tuning dials. Same Si-Te-Fi-Ne stack, same value-tradition-efficiency anchors, same difficulty expressing feelings, same hidden admiration of school idols routed through sister. She doesn't flip types between canons; she expresses different aspects of the same type. Tertiary Fi (ISTJ) fits her pattern better than inferior Fi (ESTJ): ISTJ tertiary Fi is 'clear personal values expressed clumsily,' which matches her throughout (genuine kindness she struggles to articulate, song-writing difficulty expressing what she feels, gradual integration of Fi through idol journey). Inferior Fi in ESTJ would manifest more as explosive feelings-blockage under stress; Shioriko's Fi is consistently present-but-awkward, not blocked-and-erupting. ISFJ case (PDB opinions D/E) is a clearer miss — reads anime-kindness as Fe. But her core principle 'students should do things they can succeed at' is Te utility-logic, not Fe harmony-maintenance; her talent for 'identifying strengths and weaknesses' is analytical not empathetic; her life plan of 'doing what I'm most effective at' is Te-stated. Kindness doesn't determine F-cognition. Shioriko is Hasunosora-Sayaka's Nijigasaki cousin — same disciplined-traditionalist Si-driven archetype, but routed through Te-utility rather than Fe-service. Two ISFJs (Kozue is ESFJ but similar adjacent) and now two ISTJs (Ginko ISTJ in Hasu) across the casts showing the Si-dominant type family.

rina_tennoji.name: Rina Tennoji

E.reason: Strong introvert. Shut-in pattern during low points, hides in cardboard box when stressed, surrounds herself with tech as isolation scaffolding, needed Ai to pull her out socially. 'Gets nervous easily,' avoids her own reflection during crisis periods. Her texts and board show she has expressive interior range, but her energy orientation is solidly inward. Grows socially through the arcs but never converts to baseline-extroverted; the growth is in output channels, not direction of energy draw.

J.reason: P-leaning. Tech tinkerer who experiments with gadgets constantly (quadcopter, board iterations, tablet/laptop workflows), improvisational problem-solver (invents paper board on the spot during concert when electronic board fails), information processing course fits exploratory orientation. Some discipline in craft-execution but overall orientation is adaptive and iterative rather than planned-and-executed.

T.reason: Solidly F. Core arc is entirely emotional — wants to be seen, admires Ai's warmth, cries easily (official comments: 'Sobbing' at 3rd place, 'Tear...' at 2nd place). Critical diagnostic per PDB opinion D: Rina KNOWS what she feels, struggles only with EXPRESSION — opposite pattern from INTP who would struggle to identify feelings. Her rapid board-face switching proves fluent emotional self-awareness. Tech skill is F-serving tool (routing Fi-authentic-expression through a non-facial medium), not T-cognitive-core.

C.reason: Very low. 'Anxious shut-in mess,' hides in cardboard box, couldn't even glance at herself in window panes during crisis, 'didn't have confidence to say thank you with bare face yet,' constantly worried about rankings dropping ('scared my rank could drop even if I try my best'), 'someone like me' self-referential phrasing. Improves significantly through Ai's support and arc-growth (eventually performs without the mask for Mia's sake) but the baseline insecurity is deep and formative.

M.reason: Moderate. Real competitive ambition visible in official comments — 'frustrated' at 2nd place, 'I'll try even harder so I don't lose next time,' won 1st place in July 2017 rankings, actively works hard on tech gadgets to contribute to club, keeps pushing through anxiety. Drive is present but bounded and connection-directed: she pursues idol success in service of being-seen-and-connected rather than pure competitive dominance.

O.reason: Slight positive. Genuine resilience through the arc — didn't give in to isolation, kept trying to put herself out there when easier path would be to stay hidden, survived serious low moments and built novel solutions (the board itself is a resilience-artifact). But baseline is anxious, frequently scared of setbacks, 'head is spinning' panic language. Without Ai's external support the recovery arc probably doesn't complete. Net slight positive through earned growth rather than native optimism.

A.reason: High empathy. 'Kind and supportive nature' with 'great social awareness' beneath the communication difficulty, sticks with Mia through her lashing out (after Mia slaps her, Rina checks if MIA hurt her hand — Fi compassion under physical provocation), admires Ai and eventually inverts the role to become protector herself, gradually evolves from 'protected person and taker into a protective person and giver' per fan read. Warm under the expressive-awkwardness.

U.reason: Genuinely high — both external AND internal eccentricity align. The Rina-chan Board is a unique invented communication solution (no other LL character has built a custom technology around their own personality quirks), cat-ear headphones with face-monitor display, quadcopter/tablet/laptop gadget ecosystem, chiptune-aesthetic songs, box-hiding coping mechanism, pink messy hair. Internally she's the 'kuudere who actually has enormous emotional depth' — a deliberate subversion of the cold-stone-face archetype per reddit opinion A. Surface and interior both distinctive.

N.reason: Solid Ne. Inventive creative output — 'songs and outfits are some of the most inventive in the whole LL canon' per fan read, generates novel solutions under pressure (paper-board improvisation on the spot), imaginative board-face repertoire that never seems to run out, emoji-and-flair-heavy digital expression style, tech-creative crossover. Tempered slightly by the concrete hands-on tech-gadget grounding and her focus on specific people (Ai, Mia) rather than abstract systems. Net moderately high.

rina_tennoji.mbti_reasoning: INFP with decisive fan vote majority (235 vs 84 INTP, ~3:1) and textual analysis strongly supports it — this is the archetypal 'aesthetic projection trap' character per the session guide. The INTP case is built on surface cues (tech talent, flat affect, information-processing course, emotion-board-as-logical-solution) that pattern-match to the 'cold genius' stereotype. The actual cognitive evidence runs the other direction. Key diagnostic from PDB opinion D: INTPs struggle to UNDERSTAND their feelings; INFPs understand them but can't EXPRESS them externally. Rina's rapid-fire board-switching (a new face every second per reddit opinion A) proves fluent internal emotional self-awareness — she always knows what she's feeling, the board is just the output channel. Her struggle is categorically the Fi-expression problem, not the Ti-understanding-emotions problem. The board-invention itself is diagnostic if read carefully: an INTP would build something that communicates information efficiently (slider, text, standardized symbols). Rina's solution is drawings of her own face making expressions — it preserves personal authenticity ('this is MY face making THIS feeling') while routing around the output issue. That's Fi-Ne: keep the authentic self, invent a creative workaround. Not logicizing emotion; routing Fi through a new medium. The 'wants to fit in' reading (PDB opinion E) misreads the arc: Rina doesn't want to fit in, she wants to be SEEN and CONNECTED AUTHENTICALLY ('to be connected with everyone by being a school idol'). If she wanted to fit in she'd try harder to fake facial expressions; instead she invented a radically non-conforming tool and wore it proudly. That's Fi-authenticity asserting itself through creative Ne, not Fe-conformity. Tech-skill is not a type indicator — INFPs can absolutely be technically skilled, and when they are, the tech typically serves emotional/relational goals (Rina's tech exists entirely to solve her connection problem, never as a system-building interest in itself). The 'Is this the first time I'm useful to you?' line to Ai (PDB opinion A) is inferior Te desire leaking through — classic INFP pattern of wanting to prove concrete usefulness as compensation for feeling emotionally overwhelming. This is the second INFP across the analyzed casts (Kosuzu is the other) — different flavors: Kosuzu's Fi-Ne is outward-directed challenge-generation through self-inadequacy narrative; Rina's is inward-directed expression-problem-solving through creative-technical invention. Both Fi-Ne-Si-Te stacks, different life-focus.

ayumu_uehara.name: Ayumu Uehara

E.reason: Introverted. Shy and 'a bit nervous since this is my first time' introducing herself, self-describes as ordinary, responds passively to Karin/Kasumi's mischief in 'pure manner' rather than engaging actively, needs Yu to energize her social/activity orientation. Not shut-in like Rina or box-hiding extreme — her introversion is gentle-social-shyness. Solidly introverted without being withdrawn.

J.reason: Solidly J. 'Hard-working type school idol' (コツコツ系) is literally her character descriptor, 'puts everything into what she does,' diligent and structured practice, 'step by step toward that dream' is an explicit J-planning philosophy, 'keep moving forward' as life principle. Not Sayaka-tier (+8 cyborg-discipline) because Ayumu's J is earnest-conscientious rather than inhuman-executor — still firmly planned-and-structured.

T.reason: Strong F. Entire arc is feeling-driven — bond preservation with Yu, emotional jealousy dynamics, insecurity about being loved, pure-hearted relational warmth, considers things from everyone's perspective. Fe visible in how she accommodates Yu's agenda, adapts to group dynamics, supports members' decisions even when it hurts her. No analytical/logical cognition as primary mode anywhere in her characterization.

C.reason: Very low confidence. 'Generally insecure in her abilities,' self-deprecating introduction ('my appearance is ordinary,' 'my singing and dancing are still lacking'), 'struggles revolve largely on confidence and how that relates to her dream,' explicit 'I don't believe I'm very skilled.' Deep insecurity is co-defining with hard work. Not maximally low because she keeps pushing forward despite it — functional-insecure rather than paralyzed-insecure.

M.reason: Low-moderate — hard-work ≠ ambition per the session guide rule. Ayumu didn't choose the competitive path; Yu suggested idols and Ayumu followed. She doesn't aim for #1 or articulate scale-goals — her stated ambition is 'move forward step by step' and 'make memories together.' Drive exists (keeps trying, doesn't quit) but is small-scale and duty-framed rather than competitive. Contrast sharply with Setsuna M=7 or Megumi M=8 — Ayumu works from relational duty, not from wanting to win.

O.reason: Neutral. Not cheerfully optimistic like Kaho — she's anxious, insecure, worries about being left behind, jealous-paranoid under stress. But not pessimistic either — maintains hope, keeps forward momentum, enjoys small beauties in daily life (cherry blossoms, seashells, snow, lending gloves). Cheerfulness paired with deep anxiety nets out to neutral resilience-baseline.

A.reason: High empathy. 'Kind, cheerful, friendly,' pure-hearted, genuinely considerate (shares her glove so both can have warm hands, adapts to Yu's preferences, supports members' decisions even when personally hurting). Wants everyone to get along, avoids conflict, considers everyone's perspective. Not max because her warmth is bond-bounded — intensely directed at Yu and club with the famous possessive/jealous streak when the bond feels threatened. Strong but narrow-focused.

U.reason: Low. Explicitly self-identifies as 'ordinary,' standard cutesy-childhood-friend archetype executed cleanly, no unusual hobbies or eccentric behaviors, no distinctive aesthetic beyond cute-standard. The jealous/yandere edge played for comedy is amplification of a conventional insecure-childhood-friend trope, not structural personality weirdness. Conventional archetype, conventional interior — and she knows it, which is part of her insecurity.

N.reason: Strongly S. Deeply Si-grounded cognition. Concrete episodic memory as a diagnostic trait — corrects Yu on WHEN the dish-washing-curry memory happened (middle school, not grade school), precise chronological tagging of shared experiences. Step-by-step forward-progress framework, relational-continuity focus, hands-on affection expressed through specific physical acts (gloves, snowmen, hand-holding), grounded appreciation of concrete sensory experiences (cherry blossoms, seashells, sound of waves). No abstract-visionary content anywhere.

ayumu_uehara.mbti_reasoning: ISFJ with overwhelming fan vote consensus (166 vs 4 ISFP, ~41:1) and textual analysis strongly supports it. This is a relatively clean case with multiple classic Si-Fe diagnostics: (1) The curry-dish-washing memory exchange (PDB opinion A) is textbook Si — Ayumu corrects Yu on precise chronological tagging of a shared experience ('No! That was in middle school!'). Si characters are the keepers of relational history; Yu doesn't remember, Ayumu does. (2) Fe auxiliary expressed through concrete physical service: shares gloves, holds hands, makes snowmen together, wants to 'grow step by step with everyone.' Not abstract admiration, not idealized union — concrete small shared acts. (3) Her insecurity pattern is definitively Si-comparative rather than Fi-abstract. She compares herself against specific standards ('my singing and dancing are still lacking,' 'my appearance is ordinary') and against Yu's attention to other girls. Contrast with Kosuzu INFP whose insecurity is 'I have never been amazing' (abstract Fi-values identity level). Ayumu's is 'not good enough for Yu' — concrete relational comparison. This is the clean ISFJ vs INFP insecurity distinction. (4) Dream-structure is relational-shared not Fi-individual: she became an idol because Yu suggested it, her goal is 'do this together with Yu,' and her S2 crisis is exactly what happens when Si-Fe's bond-preservation logic hits incompatibility with Yu's path. An INFP would be worried about losing their authentic self-expression; Ayumu is worried about losing the shared experience. (5) Enneagram 9w1 (PDB opinion C) maps cleanly onto Si-Fe: dislikes conflict, wants to 'merge,' considers everyone's perspective, avoids speaking up — harmony-maintenance as part of continuity-preservation. (6) Her stress response is textbook inferior-Ne under pressure: when the bond feels threatened, Si-Fe's normally-grounded present-continuity focus fractures into paranoid possibility-generation (stalking Yu, jumping to conclusions about Yu-Setsuna interaction). Normal state is calm-concrete; stressed state is threatening-possibilities. ISFP ruled out easily — she isn't Fi-values-protective (accepts her 'ordinary' self without protecting it as distinctive), isn't Se-present-aesthetically-grounded (she's memory/continuity-oriented), isn't an individuation-arc character (she's a bond-preservation character). Part of the session's confirmed 'caretaker cluster' — Ayumu, Kanata, Shizuku all ISFJ with different flavors, echoed by Sayaka in Hasunosora. Ayumu is the devoted-childhood-friend variant: Si-Fe focused on preserving a specific bond through concrete shared experience.

kasumi_nakasu.name: Kasumi Nakasu

E.reason: Solidly extroverted. Constantly broadcasts 'Kasumin' energy, loud performative presence, initiates with strangers (approached Ayumu and Yu immediately to recruit them), declares herself president as sole remaining member, refers to self in third person as public persona. But has absent-minded inner-world moments (gets lost in self-absorbed internal monologue and misses Yu standing next to her, misses Nana entering the room, misses whole club leaving her behind), and the cute-girl performance is somewhat effortful-persona rather than native radiation. Net solidly extroverted but not maxed.

J.reason: P-leaning. Spontaneous plan-generation mode is her primary cognitive activity — schemes constantly, 'spends a lot of her time scheming or thinking up new ways to ensure her own victory.' Critical diagnostic: 'these plans often fail or aren't as devious as she thinks' — poor follow-through indicates Ne idea-generation unconstrained by J-execution-discipline. Improvisational rather than structured. Some tactical discipline when Enneagram 3 achievement-drive activates, but orientation is exploratory-scheme-generation.

T.reason: Strong F. Entirely value and feeling-driven — wants to be cute because she values cuteness as a core identity component, fiercely loyal to specific friends (the 'watashi' moment with Shizuku is pure Fi-authentic care), 'good-hearted and friendly despite claiming to be mean.' Care breaks through the mischievous persona when friends are in genuine distress. No Ti/Te-analytical cognition at her core; her schemes are value-driven, not logic-driven.

C.reason: Mixed. Surface confidence ('Japan's best school idol,' demands #1, self-aggrandizing declarations) but reddit/fan reads consistently identify the Kasumin persona as constructed act covering insecurity. Bully-history backstory explicit (Kasukasu nickname wound comes from past bullies), genuinely feels outmatched by most of the group except in cuteness (reddit B: 'feels outmatched by everyone else in the group apart from cuteness'), needs support/attention to get through low moments. External declarations mask real insecurity. Net neutral.

M.reason: High. 'Wants to be number one in any competition she's in,' sore loser when achieving anything less than first place, schemes relentlessly for victory, declared herself club president as sole remaining member and held the role continuously even when more capable members joined, Enneagram 3 achievement-drive per PDB consensus. Per session-guide rule 'M measures the want, not the work' — Kasumi's want is loud and constant. Not max because scheming often operates at small-scale mischief level rather than Lanzhu-tier empire-building.

O.reason: Solid resilience. Kept the club alive as the sole remaining member when Setsuna disbanded it, bounces back from constantly-failing schemes without losing momentum, maintains hope and drive through setbacks, 'creative and optimistic enough to see the opportunity when most have lost their hope' per PDB opinion D. Bully-history and Kasukasu-wound exist but don't collapse her — she redirects them into motivation. Net strongly positive, though genuine hurt undercurrent is visible beneath.

A.reason: Moderately high empathy under self-centered surface. Genuinely considerate when it counts — rallies group spirit when Ayumu is nervous before a live, exchanges real Christmas gifts with Dengeki Online group, the Shizuku intervention is pure caring (going far out of comfort zone, dropping Kasumin-persona to use 'watashi'), loyal to people she bonds with. But baseline is 'slightly self-centered and mischievous,' schemes AGAINST rivals habitually, sore loser reactions. Warm under the selfishness layer — net positive but tempered.

U.reason: Notably distinctive. 'Kasumin' self-branding with third-person self-reference as public-persona habit, star hairpin, idol-obsession beyond other members' levels, 'black-hearted type' (腹黒系) archetype placement, constant scheming-lifestyle, Kasukasu nickname mythology tied to specific backstory, hate-mail-to-rivals habit that 'naturally becomes normal fanmail,' panels-of-herself-as-Christmas-decoration ideas. Internal eccentricity (performative cute-girl mask over hurt core is genuinely distinctive) plus external quirks. Both layers align, though the core 'cute obsessed ambitious idol' is a known archetype — Nico comparison is common.

N.reason: Moderate Ne. Plan-generation and possibility-cascading are her primary cognitive activity — comes up with endless scheme variants, 'never runs out of solutions for any problem,' quick creative idea-generation, 'Kasumi box' inventions, scare-senpais schemes. Tempered by focus on concrete immediate goals (be cute NOW, be #1 NOW) and Si-grounded specifics (memorizes voter names, detailed tree-decoration planning). Net moderate N — Ne visible but not as dominant as in more abstract-thinker ENFPs like Kaho.

kasumi_nakasu.mbti_reasoning: ENFP — DISSENTING FROM MAJORITY FAN VOTE. Fans voted ESFP 121 vs ENTJ 34 vs ESTP 1 (~78% ESFP majority), with minimal ENFP presence in voting. But textual analysis points to Fi-Ne cognition over Se-Fi, and previous session analysis already landed here. The ESFP case (PDB opinions C/E) leans on episode 8 Shizuku-detection scene as Se-sensory-acuity. Re-reading: Kasumi's attunement to Shizuku's emotional state is Fi-relational-attunement to a specific person she cares about, NOT uniform Se-environmental-tracking. Diagnostic: she repeatedly misses obvious environmental changes when self-absorbed (Yu standing right next to her, Nana entering the room, the whole club leaving her behind mid-self-introduction). An Se-dom does not miss physical movements in the room that often. Her acuity is selective-to-friends-she-values — classic Fi-focus. The ESFP 'conclusion-narrowing' argument (Kasumi says 'Shizuku is sad' vs Rina's 'maybe was... or maybe not...') is also a weak differentiator — Kasumi is just more confident about her friend-read because she cares more directly; certainty isn't Se vs Ne. The decisive ENFP evidence: (1) Her schemes constantly fail or aren't as devious as she thinks — that's Ne idea-generation unconstrained by Se practicality filter. An Se-dom would either execute schemes that work or not generate them; Kasumi generates endless unworkable plans. (2) The 'watashi' moment with Shizuku per reddit F — dropping Kasumin-persona to use genuine first-person pronoun in a vulnerable care-moment. That's Fi-core peeking through constructed Ne-persona. If she were Se-Fi, the Kasumin-persona wouldn't exist as a constructed layer to peek through. (3) Multiple fan reads independently identify the cute-girl behavior as an ACT covering hurt (reddit A: 'maybe because she struggles to say it to herself,' reddit F: 'all the insecurities that she'd been hiding underneath the mask'). Fi-Ne constructs identity-personas; Se-Fi is more present-authentic. (4) Her relationship to being cute/being #1 is Fi-identity-value ('this is who I am/want to be'), not Se-present-pleasure ('this feels good now'). PDB opinion D nails it: 'She beholds ideals too highly to conform... takes pride on being different.' That's Fi-Ne identity-construction. ENTJ is ruled out by execution failure — Lanzhu (ENTJ per Hasu analysis) actually builds her Association and runs it; Kasumi plots and fails. Te-execution is weak in Kasumi; she's value-driven not system-driven. ESFP ruled out by the constructed-persona phenomenon and the absent-minded inner-world pattern. This is the ENFP family with Kaho and Hime (Hasunosora) — Kasumi's ENFP is 'schemey-selfish surface with hidden warmth,' Kaho's is 'warm-passionate surface with hidden fragility,' Hime's is 'intense-fan-competitor with hidden Fi-wound.' Kasumi is the Nico-archetype ENFP: constructed persona over genuine care, ambition through performance.

shizuku_osaka.mbti_reasoning: ISFJ — DISSENTING FROM OVERWHELMING MAJORITY FAN VOTE (INFJ 123 vs ISFJ 6, ~20:1), but this is the closest call in the dataset and I'd honestly estimate 55/45 confidence, not higher. On re-read with official-comments-weighted-first, both cases have real evidence. Documenting the actual ambiguity here rather than pretending the call is clean. ISFJ case (what I land on): (1) September 2017 official comment is the single strongest diagnostic — 'what I should have been doing was not praying to God, but rather training myself more... Setsuna and Rina were properly CONCRETIZING the areas for improvement.' She explicitly admires their concretizing method and wants to emulate it. That's Si-Te feedback loop: observe successful concrete method → adopt through disciplined practice. An INFJ response to setback is typically Ni-reframing ('what does this pattern tell me about my approach?'), not 'do what they did more disciplinedly.' (2) October 2019 comment: 'write down the parts I can use as reference' — specific technique-cataloging after watching a performance, not principle-abstraction. Si verbatim-capture-for-repetition. (3) Shame-around-deviation: hides old-films-and-novels interest because 'afraid to be seen as an oddball.' Fe-conformity response to non-fitting, not Fi-identity-protection. Guide rule: shame-around-deviation points Fe, pride-in-deviation points Fi. (4) Bad at ad-libbing (her own Audrey lyrics acknowledge this): Ni-Se characters typically improvise BETTER than they memorize rigidly; Si-Fe characters are the opposite. Her acting strength is memorized-performance; her weakness is unscripted variability. (5) Resolution-structure is Fe-healing through EXTERNAL validation from specific people (reddit B: 'Kasumi confronting her was the first time someone saw beyond her mask'). She becomes real-WITH-others, not authentic-as-individual. (6) Treats idol activity instrumentally in her own introduction: 'I was also involved in school idol activities because I thought it would be helpful for my theater work.' Si-Fe-craft tool-stacking, not Ni-unified-vision. INFJ case (legitimate, not dismissible): (a) Her creative output is unusually sustained and symbolically coherent — the full shadow-self play with integrated thematic structure, Solitude Rain as meta-commentary on her own healing, writing her own plays and fanfic. This reads more Ni-dominant-sustained-vision than scattered-Ne-idea-generation. PDB opinion A's point here is fair. (b) Reddit B's core description — 'Shizuku was scared to be herself, actively hated being herself' — is deeper than typical Fe-conformity. ISFJ suppression is usually duty-oriented not self-hating; this level of self-alienation fits INFJ identity-crisis territory better. (c) 'What does it mean to act naturally? Is it different than playing as myself?' (Audrey lyrics) is an Ni-level abstract question about selfhood, not a Si-concrete-comparative question. (d) Her goal language ('drive my fans crazy,' 'make you smile using expressive skills as weapon') has more abstract-visionary framing than Ayumu's step-by-step. Ultimately I land ISFJ because the cognitive tells (official-comment self-correction pattern, ad-lib-weakness, shame-conformity-response) are sharper diagnostics than the thematic-depth tells, which are more interpretively flexible. But this is honestly one of the hardest INFJ vs ISFJ calls — the types share Fe, introversion, J-structure, and INFJ's inferior Se + ISFJ's dominant Si can produce similar memory-catalog behaviors. Keeping ISFJ per previous session consistency and per the diagnostic-cognitive-tells outweighing the thematic-content tells, but flagging real uncertainty. Still part of the caretaker cluster with Ayumu and Kanata, and paired with Sayaka (ISFJ) in Hasunosora — if a future re-analysis flips her to INFJ, the cluster narrative would need adjustment.

(3) Fi-guilt over Se-indulgence: October 2019 autumn-food comment has the classic ISFP values/senses tension — 'I feel an indescribable sense of guilt... if I don't switch to the autumn of sports starting tomorrow, I'm going to be in big trouble.'
